prompt: A sleek futuristic Japanese tech advertisement in a dark sci-fi showroom with glossy reflective floors and soft blue neon bokeh lights in the background. On the right side, show a tall black rectangular hologram device with transparent glass front and sides, rounded edges, and subtle camera-like sensors across the top. The device is labeled Gatebox3 and glows with cyan-blue light, including a bright cyan logo on the base. Inside the chamber, display a full-body anime virtual girl hologram floating slightly above the bottom platform, rendered as a luminous translucent blue projection with particle sparkles. She has very long twin-tail hair, a youthful idol-like design, and a futuristic white and cyan outfit with detached sleeves, short skirt, thigh-high stockings, and heeled shoes. Her face is intentionally simplified or softly obscured, and she poses with one leg bent and both arms open in a welcoming gesture. Add glowing circular projection rings at the top and bottom inside the chamber. On the left side, place a clean Japanese promotional text layout with large headline text reading 「すべてのキャラクターを輝かせる」, with the single kanji 「輝」 emphasized in bright cyan and the rest in white. Beneath it, place the Gatebox3 logo and product name in white, followed by smaller tagline text 「物語が、そこにいる。」. Along the bottom left, include exactly 4 feature icons with Japanese labels in white and cyan: 1 hologram icon with 「高精細 3Dホログラム」, 1 audio waveform icon with 「キャラクターとの 自然な会話」, 1 sun-like ambient light icon with 「空間に溶け込む 洗練デザイン」, and 1 heart icon with 「あなたのそばに いつも一緒に」. High-end commercial product visualization, premium cyber-blue color palette, cinematic rim lighting, polished reflections, ultra-clean composition, realistic device rendering combined with anime hologram character, sharp focus on the product and typography.
